title: plectronia citrifolia
intro: Plectronia citrifolia, also known as the yellow fruited plectronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Plectronia citrifolia has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used as a paste to be applied topically for its therapeutic properties.
